name: SurvivalPixel.io
description: We need you in a popular survival game. Help the Warrior survive and assist them in battling tougher monsters at each level. Be cautious, as monsters are coming from everywhere and you need to stay alive. Grab your sword, and eliminate all the monsters. The monsters you defeat will grant you health and power. Keep getting stronger and defeat the boss monsters.
instructions: Move back and forth with the WASD keys to play Mobile control buttons available
tags: .io, .io Games, 1 Player, 2D, Action, Adventure, Android, Arcade, Arena, Mobile
